title: Additional Dimensions
description: Some useful dimensions. Full of resources.
body:
# Additional Dimensions
### Remember those videos like "I found a TNT portal"?
This is a mod that adds some of those dimensions.

- Dirt Dimension
- Wood Dimension
- Stone Dimension
- Iron Dimension
- Gold Dimension
- Diamond Dimension
- Emerald Dimension
- TNT Dimension

There are also portal igniters that can be easily crafted.

Icon is made in Paint 3D
